HGSS.058.0000:
[0103,0000,0000]: ..................\f
......Oh, it’s you.\f
You must be here to catch the
legendary Pokémon to make yourself\r
look strong.\f
That is only a dream.\f
You see, the legendary Pokémon suits a
Trainer like me who has sworn to become\r
the strongest Trainer.\f
A battle with Team Rocket Grunts
is just right for you!\f
HGSS.058.0001:
[0103,0000,0000]: ...Aw, whatever.\f
You would never be able to catch a
legendary Pokémon anyway.\f
HGSS.058.0002:
Eusine: My name is Eusine.\f
I’m on the trail of a Pokémon named
SUICUNE.\f
And you are...?
[0103,0000,0000]? Glad to meet you.\f
I heard rumors that SUICUNE is here,
so I came to look.\f
Take a look at the basement through
the hole in the floor.\f
There. SUICUNE is down there.\f
I could go downstairs, but I know it
would run away in no time.\f
I know.
I have tried it many times...
HGSS.058.0003:
Eusine: There seems to be more than
meets the eye with you...
HGSS.058.0004:
Morty: My name is Morty.
I am Ecruteak’s Gym Leader.\f
Because my old friend Eusine is here
on the trail of SUICUNE, I decided to\r
investigate the Burned Tower.\f
Ecruteak has a legend about these
legendary Pokémon:\r
SUICUNE, ENTEI, and RAIKOU.\f
As the Gym Leader of Ecruteak, I must
have a proper understanding of it.
